description: Trio gate-closure loop (FEAT-010 slice 8b, US-LLM-25). Build run_gate_closure_loop in planner/orchestration.py: given the trio's accumulated draft_state (school, author), iterate to a draft that PASSES plans/services.py _check_promotion_gates. Each round: probe = save the draft_state to a Plan via save_draft_state_as_plan inside a savepoint/atomic that ROLLS BACK (save is create-only, so probing-then-rollback avoids orphan Plans), run _check_promotion_gates(plan), collect the unmet predicate messages; map each unmet predicate -> the producing spec and re-invoke it (single-spec _run_one_spec against the CURRENT draft_state, then re-fold -- folds are REPLACE-scoped so a re-invoke replaces that spec's rows); re-probe. Bounded by a hard max-rounds cap. On convergence: one real (committed) save -> the gate-passing Plan(lifecycle=PROPOSED). On cap-exhaustion: return the residual unmet predicates (no abort, no raise). Continue/stop is the DETERMINISTIC gate (DEC-58 permits the bounded autonomous loop). Gate-failure->spec mapping (derivable from TRIO_SEQUENCE + the gate predicates, verified vs source): plan scalars title/current_state/desired_state/rationale/student_impact_framing -> A1; learner_outcomes/areas_for_improvement/stakeholder_impact -> A3; accreditation_standards -> A2; success criteria -> B1; criterion measurement-channel binding -> B2 (needs C1 feedback channels); action steps -> F1; step responsible/timeline/resource/evidence -> F2/F3/F4/F5; milestone planning_method -> D1; communications + review_events + inputs + revision_rules -> G1 (G1 produces ALL of these). RESIDUAL predicates no spec closes: cycle (the save derives it via _active_cycle; absent active cycle = a precondition failure, surfaced not retried); the Phase-14 plan.clean() priority_rationale-on-deviation rule + unresolved MUST_FIX flags (not produced/triggered by normal trio output) -> surfaced as residual. SCOPE: does NOT flip lifecycle (admin-only, advance_plan_status) and does NOT persist Flag rows -- those are slice #9. Addresses FEAT-010; harness SLICE=gate_closure.
acceptance_criteria: A draft_state that initially fails one or more spec-closable promotion-gate predicates is brought, by the loop, to a saved Plan(lifecycle=PROPOSED) that PASSES _check_promotion_gates (the unmet predicates' producing specs are re-invoked and their output re-folded until the gate holds).

The loop terminates deterministically: it is bounded by a hard max-rounds cap, and on cap-exhaustion with the gate still failing it returns the residual unmet predicate messages without aborting, raising, or looping unbounded.

An unmet predicate that no trio spec can close (e.g. no active cycle, or a Phase-14 clean()/flag condition) is reported as a residual rather than retried; a spec-closable predicate is not misreported as residual.
The iteration leaves no orphan or partial Plan rows (probe rounds persist nothing); the loop does NOT change plan.lifecycle and does NOT write any Flag rows (slice #9 scope).
The whole-project gate stays green and the context cascade validates.
